name: copilot-cli-extensions
description: Eight Copilot CLI extensions: five multi-model orchestrators; Crucible, an autonomous evidence-judged investigation runner; zerotrust-sourcecheck, a 32-role source security council with hardened runtime wrappers; and mcp-autoreload for stale MCP recovery.

scripts.test:crucible:release: npm run test:crucible && npm run test:crucible:release-safe && npm run test:crucible:integration && npm run test:crucible:windows-conformance
scripts.test:release: npm test && npm run test:crucible:release-safe && npm run test:crucible:integration && npm run test:crucible:windows-conformance
